briefdescription.para: Get real array value from configuration.
Get number of species from configuration.
Get maximum number of species from configuration.
Get number of emission categories from configuration.
Get number of emission species from configuration.
Get Mie data and initialize ChemState Mie arrays.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine reads the mie/files section from the configuration, loads the Mie data files, and initializes the ChemState Mie arrays.

parameterdescription.para: ChemState object to initialize with Mie data

memberdef.argsstring: (this, filename, chem_state, error_mgr, grid, rc, num_species)
memberdef.name: load_and_init_species

briefdescription.para: Load complete species data with all properties from YAML file and initialize ChemState.

detaileddescription.para: This enhanced method loads species configuration including all properties such as molecular weight, type flags, background concentrations, etc., and initializes the provided ChemState with the loaded species data. Based on the YAML structure in test_species.yml.

parameterdescription.para: ChemState to initialize with species data
Grid geometry for concentration array initialization

briefdescription.para: Load emission-to-species mapping configuration from file.

parameterdescription.para: Optional ChemState for immediate index resolution

briefdescription.para: Find category mapping for a specific category.
Apply emission mapping to map emission field to chemical species.
Get emission mapping configuration for specific category.
Update runtime configuration from loaded configs.
Parse YAML data into structured configuration.
Load run phases configuration from YAML.

detaileddescription.para: Parses the run_phases section from the loaded YAML configuration and populates the ConfigDataTyperun_phases and ConfigDataTyperun_phase_processes arrays.
Expected YAML format: run_phases: phase_name: process1 process2 process3
Central configuration management with validation, loading, and state application.
